hero_lede: Fine linework, Nordic knotwork, and American traditional tattooing — approached with patience, precision, and a genuine interest in the story behind every piece.
about_paragraph1: Jeff is a tattoo apprentice working toward a style built on clean linework, Nordic knotwork, and blackwork — with American traditional and color as the long-term goal. Every session is about doing the fundamentals right before chasing the flashy stuff.
about_paragraph2: Currently taking linework-focused bookings while drilling the craft under mentorship. Clients are welcome to return later for shading or color work.
